chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc: Appln No.S-444 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.3736/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office object at flag “A”. 3. For hearing of main case. 24.07.2025 Applicant Mushtaque Ali in person Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General..-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- 1. Granted. 2 & 3 Applicant appearing in person, has filed instant application u/s 561-A Cr.PC, whereby impugning order dated 27.05.2025 passed by learned Additional Dist: & Sessions Judge/ Justice of Peace-III, Khairpur, in Crl. Misc: application No. 2161/2025. The applicant states that he is aggrieved with the proposed accused persons and alleged that cultivation of peddy rice is prohibited u/s 144 PPC and due to acts of proposed accused persons in cultivating rice, his adjacent land as well as land in the area is being “destroyed”. The applicant claims himself to be public spirited person and therefore he has filed the above named Crl. Misc: application. I have examined the impugned order as noted above and heard the contention of applicant very patiently. I repeatedly asked him what offence under the Pakistan Penal code or any other law for the time being in force has been made out. No cogent or rational answer has been given by the present applicant. It is well settled principle of law that scope of 22-A & B Cr.PC cannot be used for frivolous litigation and to harass and intimidate 2 innocent persons. In the face of record no offence has been made out as the allegations are based on illusionary. In the circumstances of the case I see no infirmity or illegality in the impugned order and the instant application is dismissed in liminie.

In the face of record no offence has been made out as the allegations are based on illusionary. In the circumstances of the case I see no infirmity or illegality in the impugned order and the instant application is dismissed in liminie. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
